Title: Packet loss % per device
Body: Track success/fail per ping cycle with a rolling 50-sample window. Display in inspector with green/orange/red colour coding.

Title: Jitter measurement
Body: Calculate average RTT variance between consecutive pings. Display in inspector with AVB/Milan-aware colour thresholds and alert integration.

Title: Uptime counter
Body: Track how long a device has been continuously online since last recovery. Display in inspector.

Title: RTT sparkline graph in inspector
Body: Display a live line graph of the last 60 RTT samples in the device inspector with min/max labels.

Title: MAC address display
Body: ARP lookup per device displayed in inspector with on-demand Lookup button.

Title: Zone system
Body: Colour-code devices by zone name with a persistent left-strip indicator on each tile. Zone field in inspector.

Title: Workspace search bar
Body: Sidebar search field that filters devices by name, IP, or zone. Non-matching devices dim to 22% opacity.

Title: Per-device ping monitoring toggle
Body: Allow individual devices to be excluded from all ping cycles via toggle in the inspector and group edit.

Title: Per-device SNMP/LLDP toggle
Body: Allow individual Netgear switches to be excluded from telemetry polling via toggle in the inspector and group edit.

Title: Device Debug window
Body: Password-protected debug window showing a snapshot of internal monitoring state per device including ping engine, verification, SNMP, and topology data.

Title: Device Manager overhaul
Body: Rebuilt as NSTableView with resizable and reorderable columns. Column layout saved to preferences. Auto-scales to screen. Scrollable.

Title: Group edit in inspector
Body: Select multiple devices to bulk-set zone, device type, SNMP community, ping monitoring, and SNMP monitoring in one action.

Title: Last Seen display fix
Body: Offline tile badge shows Last Seen HH:mm:ss. Never Seen for devices not yet reached. Resets on boot.

Title: Inspector responsiveness fix
Body: Inspector now renders as a permanent overlay with no layout shift on selection. Removed 500ms delay caused by refreshNetworkInterfaces on appear.

Title: URL Prefix field per device
Body: Separate prefix field (e.g. http:// or https://) from the URL suffix in Device Manager. Netgear switches default to http://.

Title: Alert export to CSV
Body: Export filtered Console Output entries as CSV via NSSavePanel from the Console Output debug window.

Title: SNMP CPU usage per switch
Body: Poll CPU load OID on Netgear M4250/M4350 switches during the existing SNMP telemetry pass. Display in inspector and tile badge.

Title: SNMP memory usage per switch
Body: Poll memory utilisation OID on Netgear switches during the existing SNMP pass. Display alongside CPU in inspector.

Title: Port up/down visual indicator in Device Ports
Body: Colour-code each row in the Device Ports table based on the existing isUp field — green for up, red/grey for down.

Title: Per-device ping interval override
Body: Allow individual devices to have a custom ping interval rather than inheriting the global setting.

Title: STP alert detection
Body: Detect spanning tree topology changes via SNMP and raise an alert. STP changes cause AVB clock disruption.

Title: AVB clock master alert
Body: Detect AVB clock domain changes via LLDP neighbour data and alert when the clock master changes unexpectedly.

Title: Historical temperature graph
Body: Temperature history samples are already stored per device. Add a graph view in the inspector to show the trend over time.

Title: Switch port utilisation %
Body: Show bandwidth in/out per port as a percentage of link speed, pulled from SNMP during the existing telemetry pass.

Title: Historical RTT graph
Body: Expand the existing inspector sparkline into a full-size RTT history graph with min/avg/max overlays.

Title: Device notes field
Body: Freetext notes field per device in the inspector. Useful for rack location, owner, or show-specific annotations.

Title: Packet loss graph over time
Body: Store rolling packet loss history and display as a graph in the inspector, not just the current percentage.

Title: Fibre loss trend alert
Body: Alert when fibre loss on a link is worsening over successive measurements rather than just crossing a static threshold.

Title: SFP temperature history
Body: Store SFP temperature samples over time and display as a graph, using the same pattern as switch temperature history.

Title: Jitter trend graph
Body: Store rolling jitter history per device and show as a graph in the inspector.

Title: Historical port statistics
Body: Track Tx/Rx counters over time per port in the Device Ports view.

Title: VLAN display per port
Body: Show the VLAN assignment for each port in the Device Ports table via SNMP.

Title: Auto-layout algorithm
Body: Automatically place devices on the workspace canvas based on LLDP topology data when first discovered.

Title: Multiple workspace layers
Body: Add a layer toggle (e.g. Physical / Logical / AVB) to show/hide different aspects of the network on the canvas.

Title: Device icon / custom image
Body: Allow engineers to assign a custom icon to a device to distinguish amps, switches, PCs, and other hardware on the canvas.

Title: Workspace templates
Body: Pre-built workspace layouts for common show configurations such as festival PA, theatre, or corporate AV.

Title: Fibre link persistence improvements
Body: Ensure fibre links survive device renames and IP changes without needing to be redrawn.

Title: Remote collector support
Body: Run Mping headless on a networked Mac and view monitoring data remotely from a separate machine.

Title: Windows support (monitoring engine)
Body: Port the monitoring engine layer to Windows. The engines are designed to be platform-independent. UI can remain macOS-native.
